Test Scenarios: US10. Book a session
Open Book a Session popup via CTA button and verify default prefill
Step:
1. Navigate to the Calendar page on the Booking feature.
2. Click the "Book a session" CTA button.
3. Verify the popup appears and the background is dimmed.
4. Verify all fields and their default values.
Expected:
- "Book a session" popup is displayed.
- Background calendar is dimmed.
- Focus is trapped inside the modal.
- Popup includes: Trainer (disabled), Client, Start Date, Start Time, Type, Name, Duration, Location, Description, Add note to client, "Book Session" and "Cancel" buttons, and Close icon.
- Trainer field is disabled and defaults to the Workspace Owner.
- Start Date defaults to today.
- Start Time defaults to 7:00 AM.
- Location defaults to "In-person".
- Duration defaults to 30 min.

Test Scenarios: Open Book a Session popup via time slot click on Day view and verify prefill
Step:
1. Navigate to the Calendar page, ensure Day view is selected.
2. Click a time slot (e.g., 6 AM–7 AM).
3. Verify the popup opens with prefilled values.
Test Data: Clicked date: today. Clicked slot: 6 AM–7 AM.
Expected:
- "Book a session" popup is displayed.
- Start Date is prefilled with the clicked date.
- Start Time is prefilled with 6 AM (start hour of the clicked slot).
- Trainer is disabled and defaults to Workspace Owner.
- Location defaults to "In-person".
- Duration defaults to 30 min.

Test Scenarios: Open Book a Session popup via time slot click on Month view and verify prefill
Step:
1. Navigate to the Calendar page, ensure Month view is selected.
2. Click a date cell (e.g., March 15, 2026).
3. Verify the popup opens with prefilled values.
Test Data: Clicked date: March 15 2026.
Expected:
- "Book a session" popup is displayed.
- Start Date is prefilled with March 15, 2026.
- Start Time defaults to 7:00 AM (no time slot info from Month view).
- Focus is trapped inside the modal.

Test Data:
Search value 1: partial name (e.g., "John").
Search value 2: partial email (e.g., "john@").
Search value 3: "zzznomatch".
Expected: - Typing triggers search after ~200ms debounce.

ID: - Results show only clients matching the typed name or email.
- When no match: blank dropdown with message ""No clients found."" is displayed.

Test Scenarios: Start Date field — keyboard input and calendar picker interaction

- Clicking a valid date in the picker applies it to the field.

Test Scenarios: Book Session — overlap detected for future session
Step:
1. Create a session on March 20 2026 at 2:00 PM – 3:00 PM for the Owner trainer.
2. Open Book a Session popup; fill all required fields with March 20 2026 start 2:30 PM, duration 60 min.
3. Click "Book Session".
4. Verify the overlap confirmation popup.
5. Click "Cancel".
6. Verify return to Book a session popup with data preserved.
7. Click "Book Session" again and click "Book Anyway".
8. Verify session is saved.
Test Data: Existing session: March 20 2026 2:00 PM – 3:00 PM. New session: March 20 2026 2:30 PM – 3:30 PM. Same trainer.
Expected:
- "Session Overlap" confirmation popup is displayed.
- Description: "You already have another session during this time. Are you sure you want to book this session anyway?"
- Clicking "Cancel" closes the confirmation popup and returns to Book a session popup with all data preserved.
- Clicking "Book Anyway" saves the session (same behavior as no-overlap: popup closes, toast shown, session appears on calendar).

- Clicking "Cancel" closes the confirmation and returns to Book a session popup with all data preserved.
- Clicking "Book Anyway" saves the session with status Completed.

Test Scenarios: Day view — horizontal stacking and sort order for overlapping sessions
Step:
1. Create three overlapping sessions: Session A at 10:00 AM for 60 min, Session B at 10:00 AM for 30 min, Session C at 10:30 AM for 30 min.
2. Navigate to Day view and verify stacking and sorting.
Test Data: Session A: 10:00 AM 60 min (older). Session B: 10:00 AM 30 min. Session C: 10:30 AM 30 min.
Expected:
- All overlapping sessions are displayed side by side (horizontally stacked).
- Sort order: Session C (later start) is to the right of Sessions A and B; Session A (same start, longer duration) is to the left of Session B.
- Among same start/same duration, older created_at is on the left.
- Each session block width is reduced proportionally to fit the available horizontal space.
- Content that exceeds block space is truncated.
